zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Hancock, Knight於1480年出生在英國德比夏爾斯特費爾德時，他的父親Sir Anthony Hancock20歲，母親Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfield26歲。他於1500年與Joan Rachel Boris在英國英格蘭德比夏爾斯特費爾德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他去世於1536年10月3日在英國德比夏爾德洛費爾德享年56歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特卡寧頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Hancock, Knight于1480年出生在英国德比夏爾斯特費爾德时，他的父亲Sir Anthony Hancock20岁，母亲Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfield26岁。他于1500年与Joan Rachel Boris在英国英格兰德比夏爾斯特費爾德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。他去世于1536年10月3日在英国德比夏爾德洛費爾德享年56岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特卡寧頓。

nameMeanings.name: Hancock,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Hann + the hypocoristic suffix -cok, which was commonly added to personal names (see Cocke ).
Dutch: from Middle Dutch hanecoc ‘winkle, periwinkle’ (a type of shellfish), probably a metonymic occupational name for someone who gathered and sold shellfish.

History: Thomas Hancock, the uncle of Declaration of Independence signatory John Hancock (1736/7–93), was among the foremost of 18th-century American businessmen. He was a descendant of Nathaniel Hancock, who was known to have been in Cambridge, MA, as early as 1634. Born in Braintree, MA, John Hancock was president of the Second Continental Congress and the first governor of the state of MA.

variants.name: Hancox
meanings: English: variant of Hancock , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Handcock
meanings: English: variant of Hancock with intrusive -d-.

variants.name: Hann
meanings: German and Dutch: from a shortened pet form of the personal name Johann (see John ).

English: from the Middle English personal name Hann, commonly a pet form of Henry (Middle English Hanry). Hann could also be a rhyming pet form of Randolph (Middle English Randal, shortened to Ran or Rand). Han was also a pet form of Joh(a)n in Middle Dutch, and it is possible that this usage was brought to England by Flemings after the Norman Conquest, but no evidence has yet been found that it was similarly used in Middle English. See Henry and Randall , and compare Hankin , Hancock , and Hanks .
English: variant of Ann with prosthetic H-.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Hancock, Knight was born in 1480, in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, his father, Sir Anthony Hancock, was 20 and his mother, Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfield, was 26. He married Joan Rachel Boris in 1500, in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He died on 3 October 1536, in Dronfield, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 56, and was buried in Cannington, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Hancock, Knight est né en 1480, à Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Anthony Hancock, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfield, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Joan Rachel Boris en 1500, à Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Il est décédé le 3 octobre 1536, à Dronfield, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Cannington, Somerset, Angleterre.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Hancock, Knight è nato il nel 1480 nel Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Anthony Hancock, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfield, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Joan Rachel Boris nel 1500, nel Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì il 3 ottobre 1536, nel Dronfield, Derbyshire, England, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Cannington, Somerset, England.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Hancock, Knight(이)가 1480년 영국 더비실르 체스터필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Anthony Hancock(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfield(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 체스터필드에서 Joan Rachel Boris(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1536년 10월 3일 영국 더비실르 드론필드에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 캔잉턴에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Joan Rachel Boris em 1500, em Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. ru.St.Mary Woolnot, London, England: ст мэри'с, эалинг, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Hancock, Knight родился в 1480 г. в местности честирфиелд, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Anthony Hancock было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfield, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Rachel Boris в 1500 г. в местности честирфиелд, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Он умер 3 октября 1536 г. в местности дронфиелд, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности каннингтон, сомирсет, Англия.
